zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionysia Rotherfield於大約1270年出生在英國越可爾溫特沃思時，她的父親Peter de Rotherfield47歲，母親Albreda Deincourt50歲。她於1288年與William Wentworth在英國越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1319年在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionysia Rotherfield于大约1270年出生在英国越可爾溫特沃思时，她的父亲Peter de Rotherfield47岁，母亲Albreda Deincourt50岁。她于1288年与William Wentworth在英国越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1319年在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dionysia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionysia Rotherfield was born about 1270, in Wentworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Peter de Rotherfield, was 47 and her mother, Albreda Deincourt, was 50. She married William Wentworth in 1288, in Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1319, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionysia Rotherfield est née environ 1270, à Wentworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Rotherfield, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Albreda Deincourt, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé William Wentworth en 1288, à Wentworth Woodhouse, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1319, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionysia Rotherfield um 1270 in Wentworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter de Rotherfield 47 und ihre Mutter Albreda Deincourt 50. Sie hat 1288 in Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England William Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1319 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Rotherfield è nata il circa 1270 nel Wentworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Peter de Rotherfield, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Albreda Deincourt, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato William Wentworth nel 1288, nel Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1319, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionysia Rotherfieldが約1270年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエントウオルスで生まれた時，父Peter de Rotherfieldは47歳，母Albreda Deincourtは50歳であった。1288年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエントウオルス ウッドハウゼでWilliam Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1319年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionysia Rotherfield(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 요르크실르 웬트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de Rotherfield(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda Deincourt(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1288년 영국 요르크실르 웬트워스 우드하우스에서 William Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1319년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1270–about 1319: tany ho any amin'ny 1270–tany ho any amin'ny 1319

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Rotherfield nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Wentworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Rotherfield, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Deincourt, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wentworth em 1288, em Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1319, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionysia Rotherfield родилась около 1270 г. в местности вентворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter de Rotherfield было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Deincourt, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wentworth в 1288 г. в местности вентворт вудхоус, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1319 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

sm.Abt 1270–about 1319: e tusa o le 1270–e tusa o le 1319

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionysia Rotherfield nació aproximadamente 1270, en Wentworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter de Rotherfield, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Albreda Deincourt, tenía 50 años. Se casó con William Wentworth en 1288, en Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1319, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
